CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JOSEPH SACRA- MENTO AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 460 SO. VAN NESS, 	, S.F, CA. - IN CONSIDERATION FOR VA- CATING PREMISES, PL. WARRANT THERE ARE NO OTHER ADULTS IN POSSESSION - PL. RETAIN SEC. DEP. - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - PL. TO PREPARE STIP. & JUDGMENT.
